items.automationLimit: AI assist is currently a deterministic placeholder helper, not a model-backed workflow.

items.automationLimit: Automated checks can validate local OAuth fixtures and scope drift, but they cannot prove a real Twitch account token, live chat send, or channel stream-key permission.
items.nextValidation: Run Console setup with real Twitch credentials, verify required scopes, send a test chat message, and confirm stream-key access.

items.automationLimit: Static artifact checks can validate bundle structure and ad-hoc signatures, but they cannot grant macOS Screen Recording, microphone, keychain, Gatekeeper, or notarization trust prompts.
items.nextValidation: Install signed/notarized artifacts on a clean Mac account and walk through first-launch permissions.
